summary: Dashboard Upgrades V219 Testing Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: Vendor Dashboard 21/21 data-testids verified, Affiliate Dashboard 22/22 data-testids verified. Sales Dashboard regression passed. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both Vendor Dashboard and Affiliate Dashboard upgrades fully tested. The /api/partner-portal/dashboard endpoint returns vendor_kpis, vendor_pipeline, work_requiring_action, recent_assignments, and charts. The /api/affiliate/earnings-summary returns extended summary with charts. The /api/affiliate/product-promotions returns products with affiliate_amount, captions, share_link, promo_code. Partner login uses unified /login page which stores partner_token in localStorage. Sales staff uses /staff-login.

response_fields.vendor_kpis: PASS - total_jobs, active_jobs, completed_jobs, delayed, settlement_total, pending_settlement, paid_settlement
response_fields.vendor_pipeline: PASS - 7 stages (assigned, awaiting_ack, in_production, ready_to_dispatch, delayed, delivered, completed)
response_fields.work_requiring_action: PASS - array with urgency, title, description, sorted by urgency
response_fields.recent_assignments: PASS - vendor-safe data (vendor_order_no, vendor_price, no customer names)
response_fields.charts: PASS - fulfillment_trend and delivery_performance with 6 months each

response_fields.summary: PASS - total_earned, expected, pending_payout, paid_out, active_promotions, successful_orders, total_clicks, conversion_rate
response_fields.charts: PASS - earnings_trend and conversions_trend with 6 months each

response_fields.products: PASS - array with id, product_name, final_price, affiliate_amount, promo_code, share_link, captions

sales_dashboard_regression.staff_login: PASS - /api/auth/login with sales credentials returns token with role=sales

data_testids_verified.partner-recent-assignments: FOUND - Shows vendor_order_no and vendor prices

affiliate_dashboard_page.products_with_share_buttons: 8 products with copy caption and share link buttons

vendor_safe_verification.recent_assignments_table: PASS - Shows vendor_order_no and vendor_price (labeled 'Price'), no customer names or Konekt margins
vendor_safe_verification.forbidden_fields_absent: PASS - No customer_name, customer_email, konekt_margin, sales_price in assignments

affiliate_products_verification.products_show_commission: PASS - Each product shows 'You earn TZS X' affiliate amount
affiliate_products_verification.copy_share_ctas: PASS - Copy caption and share link buttons present for each product

sales_dashboard_regression.dashboard_loads: PASS - Shows welcome message, KPIs, Sales Pipeline, Content to Share
